title: scaevola glandulifera
intro: Scaevola glandulifera, also known as the Australian fan flower, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Northern Australia. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Scaevola glandulifera include its ability to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Scaevola glandulifera is typically prepared as a topical cream or ointment, and can also be made into a tea or tincture for oral use.
